violations.rule: All 8 domain services should be fully registered in ServiceRegistry and ServiceProvider
violations.violation: RESOLVED: ExecutionOSMockService.ts created implementing IExecutionOSService (24 methods). ServiceRegistry.executionOS promoted from optional to required. ServiceProvider registers executionOSService singleton.

violations.rule: Every ENDPOINT defined in config.ts must have a corresponding service method in contracts.ts
violations.violation: RESOLVED: FINANCE_BUDGETS removed. FINANCE_INTELLIGENCE and WORK_REPORTS annotated as PENDING ENDPOINTS with migration notes. PAYROLL_POSTINGS now fully wired.

violations.rule: Each domain's screens should live in one directory
violations.violation: RESOLVED: common/FinanceLedger, common/FinanceQuickAdd, common/FinanceIntelligence now re-export from screens/org/ instead of screens/finance/. Legacy screens/finance/*.tsx marked DEPRECATED. F04AccountsWallets migrated to service layer.

violations.rule: Every entity type used by UI screens should have corresponding useState in its domain hook
violations.violation: RESOLVED: payrollPostings useState + 3 mutations added to useFinanceData(). AppUsageReport is callback-only in useAnalyticsData — acceptable as an on-demand report.

violations.rule: Each navManifest path should appear exactly once across all roles
violations.violation: RESOLVED: Duplicate employee-my-work entry removed from navManifest.ts

violations.rule: All service methods should return either T, PaginatedResponse<T>, or ServiceResponse<T>
violations.violation: RESOLVED: LiveActivitySnapshot interface added to types.ts. IAnalyticsService.getLiveActivity() now returns Promise<LiveActivitySnapshot>.

violations.rule: All screen files should be referenced in navRegistry.ts ROUTE_REGISTRY
violations.violation: RESOLVED: OrgAdminDashboard.tsx confirmed unreferenced and deleted.

violations.rule: All service create/update methods should validate input before mutation
violations.violation: RESOLVED: validatePayload() guard added to ServiceProvider.tsx. Applied to createEmployee, createTransaction, createReimbursement, createPayrollPosting.
